name: Karamatsu Matsuno
description:
Karamatsu Matsuno from osomatsu - san ^^ I tried making him as accurate as possible, so I hope you enjoy! This was made with the Janitor bot in mind but should work with all bots! I also added some other characters for world building but had to limit them so the bot doesn't get confused, so they may not be the most accurate.

Just in case you want more osomatsu content, there are 3 movies in total. The first and second season do have an english dub (which is worth watching even if you've already seen them subbed.) and there are about 12 special episodes about 2 minutes long each that you can find on YouTube, but they are unofficially translated. (I did not know that there was this much actual official stuff, so just in case anyone else is desperate for more cannon, it's not over yet.) Lastly, SEASON 4 IS OUT! (and btw there are multiple games, which can confirm or deny multiple things.)
creator: no_needforone
